MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Mar-05-2008 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES- ATTY. JEREMY CLOYD OF THE LAW OFFICES OF SANFORD M. CIPINKO, TEL. NO. 693-9905 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. PATRICIA BOYD APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT AND MOVING PARTY TONY VARNI.

RULING- THE CASE WAS CALLED TWICE. ON THE SECOND CALL AT 10:00 A.M., MATTER WAS ARGUED. THE COURT ADOPTED IT'S TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS - DEFENDANT TONY VARNI'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED. THERE ARE TRIABLE ISSUE OF MATERIAL FACT AS TO WHETHER ARMENTA WAS DEFENDANT'S OSTENSIBLE AGENT AND WHETHER DEFENDANT'S AGENT OKAMOTO WAS NEGLIGENT. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER PURSUANT TO CCP 437 C(g). Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR# 8189 =301/PJB/X-MS
